steps.name: history-screen
steps.summary: Added fetchRecentSessions to infrastructure/db/sessions.ts; created features/history/presentation/history-screen.tsx with loading, empty, and list states; created features/history/index.ts; exported HistoryScreen from features/index.ts; created app/history.tsx route; added '지난 세션' secondary AppButton to HomeScreen that navigates to /history. All acceptance criteria pass.
